intro: Ammi visnaga, also known as khella, is a plant-based supplement commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The capsules are typically made from the seeds of the Ammi visnaga plant and are often used to alleviate symptoms of hypertension, anxiety, and stress. However, it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Ammi visnaga capsules, as their effects and potential interactions with medications can vary from person to person.
side_effects: Ammi visnaga capsule can have side effects such as gastrointestinal upset, dizziness, and allergic reactions. More severe side effects may include increased heart rate and blood pressure. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using ammi visnaga capsules to discuss potential risks and interactions.
uses: Ammi visnaga capsule is used to treat various health issues, including bronchitis, asthma, and allergies due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. recipe: To make ammi visnaga capsule for medicinal use, the plant's seeds or roots are typically dried and then ground into a powder.
